title: Common errors — error correction (L1 Russian)
methodology_notes: Errors selected from the predictable L1-Russian catalogue (article omission, aspect transfer, do-support omission). Includes 1 'no error' item to prevent assumption that an error always exists.
sources: Swan PEU — entries on articles, do-support

exercises.rubric: Each sentence may contain one mistake. Find and correct it. If the sentence is correct, write 'OK'.

items.explanation: Correct (Present Continuous can express temporary current state).
Use the indefinite article 'a' before a singular profession.
